summary: The upstream constructor chain for the desktop-auth and login/session setup path is now mapped. The huffman/archive setup range 0x140021A40..0x140023E52 allocates a 0xC50-byte controller, calls constructor 0x140151BE0 with the new object in RCX and the parent/client pointer in RDX, and installs the returned controller at client+0x198D0. That constructor seeds login/TOTP labels, invokes the already-mapped desktop-auth setup helper 0x14015C350, and then initializes or replaces the global login/session service root at 0x140C4C9C8.
confidence: high for direct caller chain, allocation size, callsite argument registers, client+0x198D0 installation, and 0x14015C350/0x140C4C9C8 links; medium-high for the auth-controller semantic name because final class identity still depends on broader vtable/use-site typing.

chain.new_role_delta: Also constructs and installs the login/auth controller during the same client bootstrap/config setup phase.
chain.direct_caller_context: 0x140024640..0x140024B41 calls this range at 0x140024AC9 in the previously mapped config-key cluster.

installed_slot.evidence: 0x140022430 loads RBX=RDI+0x198D0 and 0x140022443 stores the returned controller pointer into [RBX].

chain.role: Consumes the freshly initialized controller and reaches the previously mapped desktop-auth config snapshot helper 0x140299C20, including the client+0x19D88 OAuth/shield root and client+0x19E30 game-session root handoff.

chain.constructor_context: 0x140151BE0 calls lifecycle anchor helper 0x14016A920, allocates a 0x2F0-byte root when needed, swaps it into 0x140C4C9C8, and destroys the previous root through 0x14016A7C0.

constructor_field_map_delta.evidence: 0x140151BFA loads descriptor/vtable-like pointer 0x140B6A028 before the constructor body initializes the object.

constructor_field_map_delta.role: parent/client pointer copy used repeatedly by later constructor blocks

constructor_field_map_delta.evidence: 0x14002233B begins replacement of this adjacent slot; 0x140022388 allocates a 0x60-byte object and initializes descriptor 0x140B5DB18.
constructor_field_map_delta.role: adjacent bootstrap/controller object created immediately before the auth controller

login_totp_label_setup.nearby_call: feeds the same auth-preparation block before the desktop-auth setup call

important_instruction_evidence.meaning: Sets the allocator secondary argument before constructing the auth controller.
Sets the auth controller allocation size.
Passes the newly allocated controller object to 0x140151BE0.
Invokes the auth-controller constructor from the bootstrap/config setup range.
Materializes the client slot that receives the constructed auth controller.
The auth-controller constructor invokes the desktop-auth setup helper.
The constructor enters the guarded login/session root replacement path.
Stores the newly initialized login/session root global.

relationship_to_prior_findings: Preserves the desktop-auth config snapshot model: 0x14015C350 still feeds 0x140299C20, which snapshots the six cached auth strings at 0x140E58B08..0x140E58B80.
Connects that desktop-auth setup to a concrete owner: 0x140151BE0 is constructed as a 0xC50 client-owned controller and then installed at client+0x198D0.
Preserves the 0x140C4C9C8 login/session root lifecycle model and adds the upstream owner path that creates or replaces the root.
Extends the config-key cluster conclusion: the earlier huffman/archive setup range also performs auth-controller construction before later RSC/huffman archive key work in the same function.
opennxt_947_server_implications: For OpenNXT 947 compatibility, auth and session behavior should be modeled as a client bootstrap subsystem rooted at client+0x198D0, not as isolated request builders.

The login/TOTP label setup, desktop OAuth/shield roots, game-session root, and 0x140C4C9C8 session request owner are initialized in one constructor chain. Server-side tracing should correlate failures across those pieces instead of treating them as unrelated phases.

The client builds or refreshes the session service root during controller construction, so OpenNXT tests should account for login/session root replacement before the first session/open request at the 0x14062A760 builder family.

The client still keeps OAuth/shield and game-session roots separate at client+0x19D88 and client+0x19E30 before snapshotting them into globals, so server config should preserve both roots even when they point at the same host.

reverser_tool_update.change: No Reverser code change was needed for this milestone; the existing direct-call, callsite-register, literal, runtime-function, and instruction exporters were enough.
reverser_tool_update.candidate_followup: Add a native allocate-call-install recognizer that detects patterns like allocator -> constructor -> client-slot replacement, emits the allocation size, constructor callsite, owner slot, and nearby destructor/replace behavior, and links those results to summary scaffolding.

next_targets: Follow client+0x198D0 use-sites and destructor paths to type the 0xC50 auth controller fields.
Continue upstream to find the producers of client+0x19D88 and client+0x19E30 rather than only their snapshot consumers.
Map the adjacent client+0x19830 and client+0x19838 bootstrap/controller slots because they are constructed immediately around the auth controller.
Implement the Reverser allocate-call-install recognizer once two or three more constructor/slot patterns confirm the abstraction.
